variant: 30-foot airline kit for TR-33, TR-35, TR-50, TR-75 four-post lifts

specifications.purpose: Provides compressed air supply along lift runways for pneumatic tool use during vehicle service

features: 30-foot airline kit for TR-series four-post lifts
Provides compressed air access along lift runways
Compatible with TR-33, TR-35, TR-50, and TR-75 models
Enables use of pneumatic tools while vehicle is on lift

parts_list.description: 30-foot airline kit for TR-33/35/50/75 four-post lifts

certifications: Designed for use with ALI/ETL certified Mohawk four-post lifts
safety_features: Must be installed per Mohawk installation guidelines
Compressed air lines routed to avoid interference with lift operation
notes: This is an accessory kit, not a standalone lift product
Designed specifically for 30-foot runway TR-series lifts
